india_trends.title: Ashok Kumar Panda takes charge as SAIL Chairman and MD
india_trends.summary: Ashok Kumar Panda is the new Chairman and Managing Director of SAIL. He previously served as Director (Finance) and Director (Commercial). Panda aims to expand SAIL's capacity to 35 million tonnes per annum. He emphasizes strengthening raw material security and market reach. His focus will be on val

india_trends.title: Around 20 metric tonnes of honey from Assam exported to US
india_trends.summary: The first consignment of One District One Product honey from Assam's Baksa district has been exported to the United States. This initiative, supported by APEDA, aims to boost farmer incomes and rural livelihoods. The high-quality honey is known for its purity.

india_trends.title: India must speed up domestic resource production amid global supply risks: Vedanta

india_trends.title: Gujarat builds 870 MW battery power backup network to stabilise renewable energy grid
india_trends.summary: Gujarat has launched battery storage systems totaling 870 MW across five locations to ensure renewable power grid stability. india_trends.title: Birla Corporation Q4 results: Cons PAT jumps 14% despite marginal revenue uptick; Rs 12.50/share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Birla Corporation witnessed a robust financial performance, with its March-ended quarter net profit soaring 15% year-on-year to Rs 295 crore. india_trends.title: Dividend bonanza on Dalal Street! From MRF to SBI, these large-cap companies announce hefty payouts for FY26
india_trends.summary: Strong earnings and cash flows have led Indian companies to announce significant dividends for FY26, reflecting confidence in their performance. Notable payers include MRF Limited, Britannia, and SBI, appealing to investors seeking passive income amid market volatility.

india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets experienced a significant downturn on Friday. Geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran, a weakening rupee, and widespread selling in financial stocks contributed to the decline. Auto and energy sectors also saw major losses.

india_trends.title: FIIs sell over Rs 2 lakh crore worth of Indian equities in 2026. What lies ahead?
india_trends.summary: Foreign investors continue to sell Indian shares in 2026. They have offloaded equities worth over Rs 2 lakh crore this year. india_trends.summary: Mumbai (Maharashtra) [India], India's protein supplements market reached approximately USD $912.9 million in 2025, according to IMARC Group, and is projected to grow to USD $1,578.1 million by 2034, reflecting a compound annual growth rate of 6.27% during 2026-2034. This transformation relies on artificial intelligence, integrated digital systems, and sustainable practices. The industry is shifti

india_trends.title: Zerodha's Nithin Kamath warns investors against ULIPs, endowment traps; says people keep making the same money mistakes
india_trends.summary: Nithin Kamath critiques the continued popularity of ULIPs and endowment plans among Indian investors, despite expert advice against them. He stresses the importance of financial literacy and cautions that access to information alone is insufficient.

india_trends.title: Adani Agri Fresh enters stone fruit segment with 25,000 MT storage capacity in Himachal Pradesh
india_trends.summary: Adani Agri Fresh Limited (AAFL) is entering the stone fruit market, starting with cherries in Himachal Pradesh. The company has invested in 25,000 MT of storage capacity to enhance shelf life and market access for farmers. This expansion builds on AAFL's extensive experience in apple sourcing and it

india_trends.title: Health insurance share rises to 41% of non-life industry in FY26
india_trends.summary: Health insurance strengthened its position as the largest segment in India’s non-life insurance industry in FY26, with its share rising to 40.8% from 38.6% a year earlier.
